report.summary: UX audit of 6 new pages (1 tool, 5 learn guides) from Mar 29 build cycle — fixed accessibility violations, added focus-visible styles, card hover animations, aria-live results count, OG image metadata gaps across 4 pages, and created missing layout.tsx for crypto-technical-analysis-guide.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: stablecoin-yield-tracker: Removed outline:none from chip filter buttons — was blocking keyboard focus visibility (WCAG violation)
stablecoin-yield-tracker: Added focus-visible styles (2px solid #6366f1) to all interactive elements: chip filters, search input, sort buttons, CTA links
stablecoin-yield-tracker: Added card hover effect (translateY -3px + box-shadow) with prefers-reduced-motion override
stablecoin-yield-tracker: Added aria-live='polite' and role='status' to filter results count for screen reader announcements
stablecoin-yield-tracker: Added hover state on CTA buttons (sytr-cta:hover) for better visual affordance
stablecoin-yield-tracker: Added rel='noopener noreferrer' to external CTA links for security
stablecoin-yield-tracker: Search input now has focus-visible border color change + subtle box-shadow

sections.title: Visuals & OG Metadata Fixes
items: All 6 new pages already had OG SVG images created (5.7–10KB each) — no new images needed
stablecoin-yield-tracker layout.tsx: Fixed OG image URL from /api/og?... dynamic route to static /og-stablecoin-yield-tracker.svg
stablecoin-yield-tracker layout.tsx: Added twitter:images reference to static SVG
tokenized-treasury-bills-guide-2026: Added OG images array, twitter card with images, canonical URL, and alternates to metadata
restaking-comparison-eigenlayer-symbiotic-karak-2026: Added OG images array and full twitter card metadata
crypto-technical-analysis-guide-2026: Created layout.tsx with full Metadata export (title, description, keywords, OG, twitter, canonical) — page was 'use client' with no metadata export capability

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: tools/stablecoin-yield-tracker (interactive tool — primary audit target, 6 fixes applied)
learn/cryptocurrency-beginners-guide-2026 (audited — already had complete metadata + OG)
learn/crypto-passive-income-guide-2026 (audited — already had complete metadata + OG)
